title: Creating a WagerProof account
description: How to sign up for WagerProof using email or Google Sign-In.

content.text: You can create a WagerProof account in two ways: with your email address or through Google Sign-In.

steps.title: Open WagerProof
steps.description: Launch the app or go to wagerproof.bet.

steps.title: Tap 'Sign Up'
steps.description: Enter your email address and choose a password.

steps.title: Verify your email
steps.description: Check your inbox for a verification email and click the confirmation link.

steps.title: Complete onboarding
steps.description: Follow the brief onboarding flow to set your preferences.

content.text: Tap 'Continue with Google' on the sign-in screen. Select your Google account and you'll be signed in immediately -- no password needed.
Google Sign-In is the fastest way to get started and avoids having to remember another password.
